reso_definition: A description or marketing information about the team.
The email address of the team.
A system unique identifier. Specifically, in aggregation systems, the TeamKey is the system unique identifier from the system where the record was retrieved.
The name under which the team operates. If a business, this may be a DBA (doing business as).

North American 10-digit phone numbers should be in the format of ###-###-#### (separated by hyphens). Other conventions should use the common local standard. International numbers should be preceded by a plus symbol.
Determines whether the account is active, inactive or under disciplinary action.

notes: RESO Teams resource has no canonical TeamType field.
